---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-section}

<div class="hero-content">

<p class="hero-tag">ISSS608 · Visual Analytics and Application</p>

# Data Analytics & Visualization Portfolio

<p class="hero-subtitle">
Welcome to my coursework website for ISSS608. This site presents my hands-on exercises,
take-home exercises, and project work in data analysis, visualisation, and analytical storytelling.
</p>

</div>

:::

::: {.section-container}

## About This Website

This website documents my learning journey in **Visual Analytics and Application**.  
It includes coursework, project outputs, and interactive visualisations developed throughout the course.

<div class="info-grid">

<div class="info-card">
<h3>Hands-on Exercises</h3>
<p>Practice-based exercises covering visual analytics techniques, tools, and implementation.</p>
</div>

<div class="info-card">
<h3>Take-home Exercises</h3>
<p>Applied assignments that combine analysis, interpretation, and visual communication.</p>
</div>

<div class="info-card">
<h3>Project Work</h3>
<p>Project-based outputs that demonstrate data exploration, storytelling, and design thinking.</p>
</div>

</div>

## What You Will Find

- Data exploration and transformation
- Data visualisation and dashboard design
- Interactive analytical workflows
- Project documentation and insights

## Course Focus

This portfolio reflects my work in developing meaningful visualisations and using data to communicate insights clearly and effectively.

:::
